title: stenopetalum trisectum
intro: Stenopetalum trisectum, also known as the Three-lobed Stenopetalum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cunoniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stenopetalum trisectum include its potential to aid in the relief of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and antifungal agent. Stenopetalum trisectum is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be made into a tincture or decoction for medicinal use.
